calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-18-2005 Continued To Aug-22-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-22-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lisa Sarto.
Charles Ramsey, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco housing Authority.
Plaintiff's witness: Kim Reeder, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Clovia Hall.
Exhibit 1 - Fourteen-day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 55 Middle Point Road, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $171.60
No Costs or Fees.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court and to prepare Judgment.

Sept. 1, 2005
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-22-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Charles Ramsey appearing for the plaintiff. Defendant Clovia Hall failed to appear. Court strikes the jury demand. The matter is to proceed as a jury trial. The settlement conference is off calendar
Comm. Sue Kaplan
Clerk: Gail Peerless
